title: cullen balsamicum
intro: Cullen balsamicum, also known as Balsamita major, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oils, which possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cullen balsamicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, Cullen balsamicum is used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
